mapper.insert: /* 포인트 환전 주문: 행 추가 (신청 상태) */ INSERT INTO POINT_EXCHANGE_ORDER (USR_SN, PT_EXC_ORD_AMT, PT_EXC_ORD_STATUS_CD, PT_EXC_ORD_DEDUCT_LDG_SN, PT_EXC_ORD_BANK_NM, PT_EXC_ORD_ACNT_NO) VALUES (#{usrSn}, #{ptExcOrdAmt}, #{ptExcOrdStatusCd}, #{ptExcOrdDeductLdgSn}, #{ptExcOrdBankNm}, #{ptExcOrdAcntNo})
mapper.select: /* 포인트 환전 주문: 내 신청 목록 (최신순 100건) */ SELECT O.PT_EXC_ORD_SN AS ptExcOrdSn, O.USR_SN AS usrSn, O.PT_EXC_ORD_AMT AS ptExcOrdAmt, O.PT_EXC_ORD_STATUS_CD AS ptExcOrdStatusCd, O.PT_EXC_ORD_DEDUCT_LDG_SN AS ptExcOrdDeductLdgSn, O.PT_EXC_ORD_RESTORE_LDG_SN AS ptExcOrdRestoreLdgSn, O.PT_EXC_ORD_PROC_USR_SN AS ptExcOrdProcUsrSn, O.PT_EXC_ORD_PROC_DT AS ptExcOrdProcDt, O.PT_EXC_ORD_RJCT_RSN_CN AS ptExcOrdRjctRsnCn, O.PT_EXC_ORD_BANK_NM AS ptExcOrdBankNm, O.PT_EXC_ORD_ACNT_NO AS ptExcOrdAcntNo, O.PT_EXC_ORD_REG_DT AS ptExcOrdRegDt, O.PT_EXC_ORD_UPDT_DT AS ptExcOrdUpdtDt, S.CMM_NM AS statusNm FROM POINT_EXCHANGE_ORDER O JOIN CMM_CODE S ON S.CMM_CD = O.PT_EXC_ORD_STATUS_CD WHERE O.USR_SN = #{usrSn} ORDER BY O.PT_EXC_ORD_SN DESC LIMIT 100

/* 포인트 환전 주문: 행 잠금 조회 (관리자 처리용) */ SELECT PT_EXC_ORD_SN AS ptExcOrdSn, USR_SN AS usrSn, PT_EXC_ORD_AMT AS ptExcOrdAmt, PT_EXC_ORD_STATUS_CD AS ptExcOrdStatusCd, PT_EXC_ORD_DEDUCT_LDG_SN AS ptExcOrdDeductLdgSn, PT_EXC_ORD_BANK_NM AS ptExcOrdBankNm, PT_EXC_ORD_ACNT_NO AS ptExcOrdAcntNo, PT_EXC_ORD_REG_DT AS ptExcOrdRegDt FROM POINT_EXCHANGE_ORDER WHERE PT_EXC_ORD_SN = #{ptExcOrdSn} FOR UPDATE

/* 포인트 환전 주문: 관리자 처리 대기 목록 (오래된 순) */ SELECT O.PT_EXC_ORD_SN AS ptExcOrdSn, O.USR_SN AS usrSn, U.USR_NM AS usrNm, O.PT_EXC_ORD_AMT AS ptExcOrdAmt, O.PT_EXC_ORD_STATUS_CD AS ptExcOrdStatusCd, O.PT_EXC_ORD_BANK_NM AS ptExcOrdBankNm, O.PT_EXC_ORD_ACNT_NO AS ptExcOrdAcntNo, O.PT_EXC_ORD_REG_DT AS ptExcOrdRegDt, S.CMM_NM AS statusNm FROM POINT_EXCHANGE_ORDER O JOIN USERS U ON U.USR_SN = O.USR_SN JOIN CMM_CODE S ON S.CMM_CD = O.PT_EXC_ORD_STATUS_CD WHERE O.PT_EXC_ORD_STATUS_CD = 'PEOC0001' ORDER BY O.PT_EXC_ORD_SN ASC LIMIT 100
